option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
# Profile Update Feature - Testing Guide
## ✅ Build Status
``` ✅ BUILD SUCCESSFUL - All compilation completed without errors - ProfileServlet.java: ✓ Implemented - ProfileService.java: ✓ Updated with updateProfile() method - ProfileDao.java: ✓ Updated with updateUser() method - profile.jsp: ✓ Gender display fixed ```
## Testing Checklist
### Pre-Testing Requirements
- [ ] Application server running (Tomcat, etc.) - [ ] Database connection configured - [ ] WAR file deployed from `target/BACKEND-1.0-SNAPSHOT.war` - [ ] User logged in and navigated to profile page - [ ] Browser developer console ready for checking for JS errors
### Test 1: Basic Profile Update ✅
**Steps:** 1. Login to the application 2. Navigate to "QUẢN LÝ TÀI KHOẢN" → "Hồ sơ của tôi" 3. Change the first name value (e.g., from "John" to "Johnny") 4. Click "Lưu" button 5. Observe page redirect and success message
**Expected Results:** - ✓ Page reloads with success message: "Cập nhật hồ sơ thành công!" - ✓ Updated first name is displayed - ✓ New timestamp visible (if timestamp displayed) - ✓ No JavaScript errors in console
**Pass/Fail:** ______
---
### Test 2: Multiple Field Update ✅
**Steps:** 1. On profile page, update multiple fields: - First name: "John" → "Jonathan" - Last name: "Doe" → "Smith" - Phone: "0123456789" → "0987654321" - Date of birth: Leave as is 2. Click "Lưu"
**Expected Results:** - ✓ All fields update successfully - ✓ Success message appears - ✓ After refresh, all new values persist
**Pass/Fail:** ______
---
### Test 3: Gender Selection Update ✅
**Steps:** 1. On profile page, select a different gender option 2. Click "Lưu"
**Expected Results:** - ✓ Gender in database changes (MALE/FEMALE/OTHER) - ✓ After page refresh, correct radio button is checked - ✓ Success message appears
**Pass/Fail:** ______
---
### Test 4: Date of Birth Update ✅
**Steps:** 1. Set date of birth to "1990-01-15" 2. Click "Lưu" 3. Refresh the page
**Expected Results:** - ✓ Date is saved correctly - ✓ After refresh, date persists - ✓ Date format remains: YYYY-MM-DD
**Pass/Fail:** ______
---
### Test 5: Empty First Name - Validation ❌
**Steps:** 1. Clear the first name field 2. Click "Lưu"
**Expected Results:** - ✓ Page shows error: "Tên không được để trống" - ✗ No database update occurs - ✓ Other fields remain unchanged
**Pass/Fail:** ______
---
### Test 6: Empty Last Name - Validation ❌
**Steps:** 1. Clear the last name field 2. Click "Lưu"
**Expected Results:** - ✓ Page shows error: "Họ không được để trống" - ✗ No database update occurs
**Pass/Fail:** ______
---
### Test 7: Invalid Phone Number - Too Short ❌
**Steps:** 1. Enter phone: "123456789" (9 digits) 2. Click "Lưu"
**Expected Results:** - ✓ Page shows error: "Số điện thoại không hợp lệ (10-20 chữ số)" - ✗ No database update occurs
**Pass/Fail:** ______
---
### Test 8: Invalid Phone Number - Non-Numeric ❌
**Steps:** 1. Enter phone: "0123456a89" (contains letter) 2. Click "Lưu"
**Expected Results:** - ✓ Page shows error: "Số điện thoại không hợp lệ (10-20 chữ số)" - ✗ No database update occurs
**Pass/Fail:** ______
---
### Test 9: Valid Phone Number - Boundary ✅
**Steps:** 1. Enter phone: "0123456789" (10 digits - minimum) 2. Click "Lưu"
**Expected Results:** - ✓ Update succeeds - ✓ Success message appears
**Pass/Fail:** ______
---
### Test 10: Phone Number - Maximum Length ✅
**Steps:** 1. Enter phone: "01234567890123456789" (20 digits - maximum) 2. Click "Lưu"
**Expected Results:** - ✓ Update succeeds - ✓ Success message appears
**Pass/Fail:** ______
---
### Test 11: Email Field - Read-Only ✅
**Steps:** 1. Try to click on or modify the email field 2. Attempt to change email value
**Expected Results:** - ✓ Email field is disabled/read-only - ✓ Cannot enter text in email field - ✓ Email value never changes
**Pass/Fail:** ______
---
### Test 12: Session Update ✅
**Steps:** 1. Update profile (any field) 2. Navigate to another page requiring user info 3. Check if new value is reflected
**Expected Results:** - ✓ User session is updated immediately - ✓ New values appear on other pages - ✓ No need for re-login
**Pass/Fail:** ______
---
### Test 13: Database Persistence ✅
**Steps:** 1. Update profile with unique values 2. Logout 3. Close browser completely 4. Open browser and login again 5. Navigate to profile
**Expected Results:** - ✓ Saved changes persist - ✓ Values match what was entered - ✓ Not reverted to previous values
**Pass/Fail:** ______
---
### Test 14: Timestamp - Updated At ✅
**Steps:** 1. Note current "updated_at" timestamp (if visible) 2. Update any field 3. Click "Lưu" 4. Check if timestamp changes
**Expected Results:** - ✓ "updated_at" timestamp changes - ✓ Timestamp is recent (current time) - ✓ "created_at" remains unchanged
**Pass/Fail:** ______
---
### Test 15: All Fields Optional Except Required ✅
**Steps:** 1. Clear optional fields (gender, DOB) 2. Keep required fields filled 3. Click "Lưu"
**Expected Results:** - ✓ Update succeeds - ✓ Optional fields can be cleared - ✓ Required fields show error if empty
**Pass/Fail:** ______
---
## Browser Console Testing
Open Developer Tools (F12) and ensure:
**Console Tab:** - [ ] No JavaScript errors - [ ] No TypeError exceptions - [ ] No network errors (404, 500, etc.) - [ ] Form submission completes successfully
**Network Tab:** - [ ] POST request to `/user/profile` shows 302 (redirect) - [ ] Redirect to `/user/profile` shows 200 (success) - [ ] No failed requests - [ ] Response headers show SET-COOKIE for session
**Application/Storage:** - [ ] Session cookie persists - [ ] Session ID remains same after update - [ ] Other session attributes visible
---
## Test Results Summary
| Test # | Test Name | Result | Notes | |--------|-----------|--------|-------| | 1 | Basic Profile Update | PASS/FAIL | | | 2 | Multiple Field Update | PASS/FAIL | | | 3 | Gender Selection | PASS/FAIL | | | 4 | Date of Birth | PASS/FAIL | | | 5 | Empty First Name | PASS/FAIL | | | 6 | Empty Last Name | PASS/FAIL | | | 7 | Invalid Phone - Short | PASS/FAIL | | | 8 | Invalid Phone - Non-Numeric | PASS/FAIL | | | 9 | Valid Phone - Min | PASS/FAIL | | | 10 | Valid Phone - Max | PASS/FAIL | | | 11 | Email Read-Only | PASS/FAIL | | | 12 | Session Update | PASS/FAIL | | | 13 | Database Persistence | PASS/FAIL | | | 14 | Timestamp Update | PASS/FAIL | | | 15 | Optional Fields | PASS/FAIL | |
**Overall Result:** ___________________
---
## Bug Reporting Template
If any test fails, use this template to report:
``` ## Bug Report
**Test Number:** [e.g., Test 5] **Test Name:** [e.g., Empty First Name - Validation] **Expected Result:** [what should happen] **Actual Result:** [what actually happened] **Browser:** [e.g., Chrome 123, Firefox 122] **Steps to Reproduce:** [step-by-step] **Console Errors:** [any errors from F12] **Screenshots:** [attach if relevant] ```
---
## ✨ Success Criteria
All tests must PASS for the feature to be production-ready: - ✅ All positive tests (1-4, 9-10, 12-15) pass - ✅ All validation tests (5-8, 11) pass correctly - ✅ No JavaScript console errors - ✅ No server errors (check logs) - ✅ Database changes persist - ✅ Session updates correctly
---
## Deployment Checklist
After successful testing: - [ ] All tests marked as PASS - [ ] No critical bugs found - [ ] Application logs reviewed - [ ] Database backup created - [ ] WAR file backed up - [ ] Ready for production deployment
---
## Support
For issues or questions: 1. Check server logs: `tail -f tomcat/logs/catalina.out` 2. Check application logs: `tail -f logs/app.log` 3. Review error messages in UI 4. Check browser F12 console for JS errors 5. Verify database connectivity
---
**Testing Date:** _______________ **Tested By:** _______________ **Approval Date:** _______________

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
